title: 8.8" Decorative LED Light Up Numbers, Marquee Numbers Lights for 6th Birthday Decorations, Lighted Number Sign for Birthday Party Night Lights Wedding Anniversary Home Wall Decor, White Number 6
features: 【Birthday Party Number Lights】You will receive 1 pieces of white LED number lights with warm white lights. It's a great way to light up the good moments with the LED number lights. Warm lights to create a cozy atmosphere, which will make the birthday party more memorable.

【Battery Powered Marquee Numbers】Marquee number sign designed with warm white led lights, powered by 2 AA batteries(not included). Its portable design allows you to easily carry it to any party occasion.

【Wall & Table Decor】With keyhole slot in back, marquee alphabet sign can be hung on walls. Decorative number sign designed with flat bottom, which can be placed on the table steadily. Use it to beautify your home, light up your party.
【Dimension】Size approx(H x D): 8.66" x 1.78"（22cm x 4.5cm), each number is designed with different width. Detailed dimension in picture.

【Wonderful Party Decorations】The number lights are great for birthday party supplies and decorations, which will add infinite charm and unforgettable memories to your party. The eye-catching number is perfect for birthday, anniversary, wedding and any other celebrations.
description: Product Description Light Up Numbers for Birthday Decorations The marquee letter designed with LED warm white lights , which will make your parties scene shine. Those gorgeous lights will create a fun and passionate atmosphere for you and your friends, letting everyone indulge in the joy of celebration. Battery Powered Marquee Numbers Two Ways to Display: With hanging hole on the back, the number sign can be hung on walls. Each lighted number designed with flat bottom, which can be placed on the table steadily. Birthday Party Number Lights The lighted marquee numbers are made of brightness led beads that emit bright light to make your birthday party scene shine and also will make everyone immersed in the joy of celebration. The led number lights are great for birthday party supplies and decorations, which will add infinite charm and unforgettable memories to your party. The eye-catching set is perfect for birthday party, wedding anniversary and other celebrations. Led Lamp Battery Powered (2*AA not include) Switch (ON/OFF) Hanging Hole
